---
title: "Experience & Leadership"
---

## Professional Experience

### **Cyber Centre of Excellence, Gujarat Police**
**Software Engineering Intern**  
*May 2026 - Present* | *Gandhinagar, Gujarat*

Working as a backend and systems architect on the **Integrated Criminal Intelligence & Investigation Platform (ICIIP)**, a mission-critical enterprise system designed for secure, multi-tier suspect tracking and database audits across the state's police hierarchy.

#### **Key System Contributions**
*   **Two-Step Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)**
*   **Hierarchical Scoped Authorization (RBAC + ABAC)**
*   **Data Archival & Retention Pipeline**
*   **Distributed Rate Limiting Middleware**
*   **Personnel Onboarding Gates**

## Leadership & Positions of Responsibility

### **TEDxIITGandhinagar**
**Technical Coordinator & Tech Lead**  
*May 2025 - April 2026*

Managed the end-to-end development, deployment, and operation of the organization's digital web infrastructure, serving over 1,500 monthly page views and replacing vendor services with custom software.

#### **Key Technical Contributions**
*   **Secure Merchandise POS Pipeline ([Project Details](projects/tedxiitgandhinagar.qmd)):** Designed a checkout pipeline integrating the **Razorpay Payment Gateway** with a Node.js backend. Implemented HMAC-SHA256 signature verification on asynchronous webhooks to confirm and log orders.
*   **TEDxPEDITION Real-Time Mobile Web App ([Project Details](projects/tedxiitgandhinagar.qmd)):** Designed a responsive React web portal for a campus-wide treasure hunt. Integrated location QR-code checks and Firebase Firestore queries to calculate live scores and render real-time leaderboards.
*   **Custom Recruitment Platform:** Built a multi-step candidate onboarding portal utilizing **Firebase Authentication** (Google OAuth 2.0) and serverless Google Apps Script triggers to register and screen 200+ applications.
*   **Push Notifications Channel:** Integrated the Firebase Cloud Messaging (**FCM**) SDK and service workers to support direct background browser push notifications.

***

### **Metis (Web & App Development Club, IIT Gandhinagar)**
**Core Committee Member**  
*August 2025 - April 2026*

Actively promoted software engineering, coding culture, and project development on campus by coordinating learning bootcamps and mentoring junior students.

#### **Key Contributions**
*   **Developer Mentorship:** Mentored 30+ junior club members.
*   **React Workshop Lead:** Conducted hands-on tutorials teaching junior students React state management, component lifecycle, and REST API integration.
*   **Hackathon Convener:** Coordinated and executed coding challenges on campus to foster collaborative development.
